treatment_information.treatment_response: Calm but non-sensical, yelling occasionally, unable to articulate reasons for being there.

treatment_timeline.event: Patient presented with delirium/confusion and increased agitation.
Patient received haldol 0.5 mg IV for increased agitation.
Patient was admitted for work-up of reversible causes of delirium.

patient_outcome.final_status: Confused - always, but alert and interactive.
patient_outcome.quality_of_life: Out of bed with assistance to chair or wheelchair.
